slice: "everything should be on cloud... world & studio both. i dont want any kind of trouble later on. no data loss beacause of whatsoever reason." Draft Asset Architecture already externalized every IMAGE out of Project JSON into Supabase Storage -- the JSON itself is small now, but still local-primary: projectStore.js writes the WHOLE array of every World Project to one localStorage key, and Supabase's builder_projects table is only ever a best-effort background backup nobody reads from during live editing. A Plan-agent design review surfaced the one hard constraint this effort is built around: ProjectStore's public functions (list/get/save/duplicate) are synchronous today -- ~150 real call sites read a {ok,error} result in the same tick, and IndexedDB has no synchronous write. New js/projectCache.js is an in-memory Map mirror, hydrated from IndexedDB once at boot, that every public function will read/write synchronously (Phase 2) -- the real IDBObjectStore.put() fires in the background, never awaited, exactly js/assetStore.js's own put() pattern pushed one level further. Implements a projects+pendingCloudSync IndexedDB schema (one transaction per edit), hydrate()/putLocal()/removeLocal()/drainPendingSync() (a retry-forever loop reusing AssetStore.BACKOFF_MS, newly exported rather than forked), an ordering guard against rapid sequential edits, a one-time legacy-localStorage migration (idempotent, never deletes the legacy key), and a graceful IndexedDB-unavailable degrade. Loaded now, called by nothing yet -- zero behaviour-change risk, matching Draft Asset Architecture's own Phase A discipline exactly. Verified via a new scratch Playwright suite (hydrate/putLocal/get/list/removeLocal/drainPendingSync/getPendingSyncCount all correct in isolation with no real Supabase reachable; the untouched ProjectStore/Welcome-screen render path confirmed unaffected) plus both goldenBuild.js suites, unchanged (30/30 each). No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder architecture change, no supabase/schema.sql change needed. Phases 2 (ProjectStore/_persist/_scheduleCloudSync rewire, retire _attemptQuotaSelfHeal), 3 (cloud-first Welcome screen, Storage Meter repurpose), 4-6 (the Studio/creator-project mirror of this same architecture plus final verification) remain named, not-yet-started increments -- see CLAUDE.md's own entry and the plan file's phased rollout section.
